name: tixiaozhu
description: Source-available Chinese education-product engineering sample for practice, question banks, admin operations, and launch-readiness audits.

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix admin run build
scripts.db:local:start: docker rm -f tixiaozhu-postgres-local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker run -d --name tixiaozhu-postgres-local -e POSTGRES_DB=tixiaozhu -e POSTGRES_USER=tixiaozhu -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=tixiaozhu_local_password -p 55432:5432 -v tixiaozhu-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data --health-cmd="pg_isready -U tixiaozhu -d tixiaozhu" --health-interval=5s --health-timeout=3s --health-retries=12 postgres:16-alpine
scripts.db:local:reset: docker rm -f tixiaozhu-postgres-local >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker volume rm tixiaozhu-postgres-data >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
scripts.db:import:local-postgres: TIXIAOZHU_DATA_LAYER=postgres DATABASE_URL=postgres://tixiaozhu:tixiaozhu_local_password@127.0.0.1:55432/tixiaozhu TIXIAOZHU_DATABASE_TABLE=tixiaozhu_store npm --prefix backend run store:import -- backend/data/pre-postgres-store-backup.json
scripts.db:verify:local-postgres: TIXIAOZHU_DATA_LAYER=postgres DATABASE_URL=postgres://tixiaozhu:tixiaozhu_local_password@127.0.0.1:55432/tixiaozhu TIXIAOZHU_DATABASE_TABLE=tixiaozhu_store npm --prefix backend run store:export -- backend/data/postgres-verify-export.json
scripts.audit:production-build: npm run build && npm --prefix backend run audit:production-build
scripts.audit:launch-ui: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && npx playwright test backend/scripts/audit-launch-ui.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.audit:interaction-qa: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && npx playwright test backend/scripts/audit-interaction-qa.spec.js --reporter=line
